title: When making regional transfers, your funds often take a detour:
snippet: Lisk (@Lisk): When making regional transfers, your funds often take a detour: Local currency → USD/EUR → local currency For you, this means: 🔹 2 FX conversions 🔹 more intermediaries 🔹 more delays Not due to technical requirements, but structural issues. Stablecoins fix this. https://t.co/e04CN50AxX
